title: MEDIATION SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTER FOR DIALOGUE AND RESOLUTION COOS COUNTY MEDIATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mediation and conflict coaching services for disputes involving community members, interpersonal issues, landlords and tenants, property, noise, pets, workplace conflicts, consumers and merchants, businesses and clients, business dissolution, police/citizen dialogue, contract claims, and foreclosure avoidance. Assists county circuit courts by mediating small claims and residential eviction matters. 1611 Virginia Avenue Suite 209 North Bend, OR 97459 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Appointments can be made outside of these hours. Email (458) 239-5435 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (458) 239-5435 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Sliding scale fees available depending on income. No one is turned away due to inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Conflict Resolution Training Landlord/Tenant Dispute Resolution Mediation Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Organizational Conflict Resolution Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER FOR DIALOGUE AND RESOLUTION COOS COUNTY
